executives.name: Marshall Koval
executives.background: CEO of Lumina Gold Corp. Over 35 years of experience in executive and technical roles in the mining industry.

executives.name: Ronald Halas
executives.background: Mr. Halas is a Professional Engineer with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including roles at IAMGOLD, Kinross Gold, and Vale.

executives.name: Scott Hicks
executives.background: Mr. Hicks is a corporate director with over 15 years of experience in the resource sector, specifically in corporate finance and M&A.
